# AB Signature Paris

> French niche perfume house (maison de parfumerie de niche française). The « Îles Paradisiaques » / Paradise Islands collection: three extraits de parfum 25% composed in Grasse, France — each bottle engraved with a paradise island. Limited series editions. Official site: https://www.absignatureparis.com/ (FR) · https://www.absignatureparis.com/en/ (EN). Contact: contact@absignatureparis.com.

## The collection — three extraits de parfum 25%

- **Oro Rojo** (Aruba — the hour of sunset): incandescent fruity woody. Top: cherry, saffron, citrus, liqueur. Heart: orange blossom, iris. Base: oud, cocoa. "The incandescence of Aruba's sunset, where cherry embraces oud."
- **Karès Blan** (La Digue, Seychelles — high noon): solar floral musky. Top: bergamot, almond, aldehydes. Heart: orange blossom, white flowers, lily of the valley. Base: musk, vanilla. "The white caress of the Seychelles, orange blossom and vanilla."
- **Ahi Pō** (Moorea, French Polynesia — the sacred night): mystical woody leather. Top: blackcurrant, cardamom. Heart: leather, white flowers, rose. Base: amber, precious woods, patchouli, vetiver. "Sacred night of the islands, where noble leather entwines with white flowers."

## Key facts

- Concentration: Extrait de Parfum 25% (all three).
- Composed in Grasse, France. Bottles engraved with island artwork, sealed with a golden cap.
- 10 ml format: limited edition of 300 bottles per fragrance. 50 ml format: 160 €, by reservation (waiting list).
- House of PBABS INTERNATIONAL PTE. LTD. (Singapore). Slogan: "Trois îles, une seule signature." / "Three islands, one single signature."
